query:
-- 查询A1502484的计划数据
SELECT 
  materialCode,
  materialName,
  dailySchedule
FROM material_items
WHERE planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1)
  AND materialCode = 'A1502484';

-- 查询A1502484的实际到货数据
SELECT 
  materialCode,
  businessDate,
  actualQuantity,
  supplierName
FROM actual_receipts
WHERE materialCode = 'A1502484'
ORDER BY businessDate;

-- 查询A1502484的实际到货数据
